description_long: This is a small, single-engine airplane with a high-wing configuration and a tricycle landing gear. The fuselage is primarily white with blue and gray accents, and the wings are straight with a slight dihedral angle. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, featuring a clear canopy and side windows. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizer, both accented in blue. The landing gear includes two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The overall design suggests a light general aviation aircraft, suitable for short flights and training purposes.
description: A small, high-wing, single-engine airplane with blue, white, and gray coloring, featuring a tricycle landing gear and a forward cockpit. The design is typical of light general aviation aircraft.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, nose wheel, and the high-wing structure with blue-tipped landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the straight wing, blue and gray fuselage striping, and the main landing gear under the wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section with blue accents, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the propeller, cockpit windows, and the tricycle landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with slight dihedral angle and no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
